articles.title: Sony Just Launched an Ethereum Network—Will It Get PlayStation Games?
articles.description: PlayStation maker Sony launched its Ethereum network Soneium this week, and games are coming—but will we see Kratos and other PS5 icons?

articles.title: Can Ethereum price go to $4K? ETH’s open interest surges as institutions turn bullish
articles.description: ETH price fell by 11% over the past 30 days but bullish sentiment and other data point toward a rally to $4,000.

articles.title: Ethereum (ETH) Pectra Mainnet Upgrade Date Confirmed by Devs
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH), world's largest programmable blockchain, starts rolling out Pectra mega-upgrade this March

articles.title: LA Wildfires Ethereum NFT Benefit Project Features Art From CryptoPunks Creator
articles.description: The “I Heart LA” collection lets people mint original art from one of seven artists while benefiting Los Angeles wildfire relief efforts.

articles.title: Solana Governance Proposal Seeks to Transform $SOL into ‘Ultra-Sound Money’
articles.description: Multicoin Capital proposes a new programmatic $SOL emission schedule.

articles.title: Ethereum developers aim for Pectra mainnet upgrade in March
articles.description: Ethereum developers aim to launch the network’s Pectra upgrade in March 2025, with specific milestones leading up to this mainnet fork.

articles.title: Crypto Trading Volumes on Centralized Exchanges Reached Record $11.3 Trillion in December
articles.description: Last month marked a historic peak in crypto trading volumes on centralized exchanges, driven by increased market activity and Bitcoin's price surge.

articles.title: Swiss PostFinance Bank Launches Ethereum Staking To Expand Crypto Offering
articles.description: Digital assets are making inroads into the traditional banking space, at least in Switzerland. In an update, PostFinance AG, the Swiss state-owned bank, says it is offering staking services to digital asset holders. This offer is available to Ethereum (ETH) users for now. PostFinance Offers Ethereum Staking for Passive Income The offer will allow holders […] The post Swiss PostFinance Bank...

articles.title: $3B in Bitcoin, Ethereum Options Expire as Trump Era Begins
articles.description: $3 billion in Bitcoin and Ethereum options expire today, fueling market volatility as BTC surpasses $100K ahead of Trump's pro-crypto inauguration.

articles.title: XRP Overtakes Ethereum in Trading Volume – $5 Next for XRP Price?
articles.description: XRP has surpassed Ethereum (ETH) in trading volume, reflecting growing investor confidence. The cryptocurrency has recorded a strong price rally as its weekly gain surpasses Ethereum’s. This activity in the market may be a continuation of this trend, or XRP price could get to $5 soon.
